title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 526.090 - Venue of proceedings to stay judgment
text:
526.090.  Venue of proceedings to stay judgment. — Proceedings on an injunction to stay a suit or judgment shall be had in the county where the judgment was rendered or the suit is pending, and the summons may be directed and served as summons in ordinary cases.
(RSMo 1939 § 1665) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1501; 1919 § 1951; 1909 § 2516
